comment: virtual_voices: key is the exposed voice name. base: reference audio filename in prompts/ or examples/. emo_vector is 8-dim emotion control; order is [喜/Happy, 怒/Angry, 哀/Sad, 惧/Afraid, 厌恶/Disgusted, 低落/Melancholic, 惊喜/Surprised, 平静/Calm]. emo_weight is optional. Optional sampling params: do_sample, top_p, top_k/top_K, temperature, length_penalty, num_beams, repetition_penalty, max_mel_tokens, max_text_tokens_per_segment.
